title: IT Cybersecurity Internship
description:
🚀 IT / Cybersecurity Internship (100% Remote – AZ Residents Only
Are you a student in IT, Computer Science, or Cybersecurity looking for real-world experience? This is your chance to learn, grow, and get hands-on in a dynamic environment.
💡 We’re looking for someone who is:
Curious, driven, and a self-starter
Comfortable figuring things out (yes—Googling counts!)
Not afraid to ask, “Can you help me?”
Engaged, communicative, and team-oriented
Education
Currently enrolled in an IT Cyber Security degree program at an accredited college or university.
Completion of one year of college.
Special Skills
Advanced Computer skills.
Ability to test and document computer systems.
Proficient oral and written communication skills.
Proficient organization skills.
⚡ What you’ll get:
Hands-on cybersecurity & IT experience
Mentorship + coaching
Flexible hours (~20 hrs/week) – school comes first
Fully remote (must live in AZ) + equipment provided
📩 Know someone who would be a great fit? Send them my way or reach out!
